name: scaramanga
description: A lightweight desktop application for learning Japanese through manga.

scripts.build:app: npm run prestart && npm run build
scripts.package:all: npm run package:app:installer && npm run package:ocr-runtime
scripts.package:app:installer: npm run build:electron && npm run build && npm run clean:package && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win nsis
scripts.package:app:portable: npm run build:electron && npm run build && npm run clean:package && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win portable
scripts.package:app:dir: npm run build:electron && npm run build && npm run clean:package && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win dir
scripts.clean:package: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$workspace = (Get-Location).Path; $buildDir = [System.IO.Path]::GetFullPath((Join-Path $workspace 'build')); if (-not $buildDir.StartsWith($workspace, [System.StringComparison]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)) { throw 'Refusing to clean outside the workspace.' }; Stop-Process -Name 'scaramanga','Scaramanga','manga-helper','Manga Helper','app-builder','app-builder.exe','electron' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; if (Test-Path $buildDir) { Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $buildDir -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in '.exe', '.lnk', '.blockmap' -or $_.Name -in 'latest.yml', 'builder-debug.yml', 'builder-effective-config.yaml' } | Remove-Item -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $winUnpacked = Join-Path $buildDir 'win-unpacked'; if (Test-Path $winUnpacked) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $winUnpacked -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }"
